Functions for initializing, starting, and checking the reset flag of a watchdog timer.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions for managing a watchdog timer. The function [`watchdog_init`](<#watchdog_init>) initializes the watchdog timer, preparing it for use. The function [`watchdog_start`](<#watchdog_start>) begins the operation of the watchdog timer. The function [`watchdog_check_reset_flag`](<#watchdog_check_reset_flag>) returns a boolean value indicating whether a reset flag is set, which can be used to determine if the watchdog timer has triggered a system reset. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` allows the use of the `bool` type for the return value of [`watchdog_check_reset_flag`](<#watchdog_check_reset_flag>).
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
